     The Numbers Business Report

Little (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $40,860,481Details
International Box Office $8,347,436
Worldwide Box Office $49,207,917
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,256,220
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,555,413
Total $2,811,633
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Jordan Sanders, a 13-year-old girl, wakes up in her adult self’s penthouse just before a do-or-die presentation. Jordan’s long-suffering assistant April, the only one in on the secret that her daily tormentor is now trapped in an awkward tween body just as everything is on the line.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$15,405,455 (37.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.65 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:83.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,667 opening theaters/2,667 max. theaters, 3.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $53,350,582

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 12th, 2019 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (Israel)
April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (Lebanon)
April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (New Zealand)
April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (Middle East Region)
April 11th, 2019 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: June 25th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some suggestive content.
(Rating bulletin 2566 (Cert #52056), 2/20/2019)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Plot point: Body Swap, Boss From Hell, Bullies, Curses
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Legendary Pictures, Perfect World Pictures, Will Packer Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
